news.title: Leaked Code for Anthropic’s Claude Code Tests Copyright Challenges in A.I. Era
news.snippet: Artificial intelligence tools are making it faster than ever to reproduce creative work. Does copyright even matter anymore?

news.title: Musk’s SpaceX Goals Shift Ahead of Its I.P.O.
news.snippet: As SpaceX prepares to go public, Mr. Musk has proposed moonshots that differ from the company’s original aim of reaching Mars.

news.title: SpaceX Strikes Deal With Cursor for $60 Billion
news.snippet: The potential acquisition comes as Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite maker, which has been emphasizing artificial intelligence, is preparing to go public.

news.title: California Accuses Amazon of Price Fixing in Legal Filing
news.snippet: The state claimed the e-commerce giant pressured brands like Levi’s and Hanes to ask competing retailers to raise prices on certain products.

news.title: White House and Anthropic Hold ‘Productive’ Meeting, Aiming for a Compromise
news.snippet: Friday’s meeting at the White House followed the introduction of Anthropic’s powerful new artificial intelligence model, Mythos, which U.S. officials believe could be critical for security.

news.title: Cerebras, an A.I. Chip Maker, Files to Go Public as Tech Offerings Ramp Up
news.snippet: The Silicon Valley chip maker filed a prospectus just as SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI prepared for their own listings, in what is shaping up to be a wave of enormous initial public offerings.

news.title: AI is flattening the jobs market for young people, says Sunak
news.snippet: The former prime minister said graduates' concerns about getting entry-level jobs are justified.

news.title: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
news.snippet: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.

news.title: Anthropic investigating claim of unauthorised access to Mythos AI tool
news.snippet: The AI company has said the model is too dangerous to release publicly because of its hacking capabilities.

news.title: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
news.snippet: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.

news.title: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
news.snippet: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.

news.title: New era as Apple names new boss to replace Tim Cook after 15 years
news.snippet: Ternus will take over running the technology giant in September as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.

news.title: Blue Origin rocket grounded after satellite 'mishap'
news.snippet: The firm founded by Amazon billionaire Jeff Bezos is investigating the failed launch.

news.title: White House and Anthropic hold 'productive' meeting amid fears over Mythos model
news.snippet: The discussion is a sign the AI firm's technology may be too critical for even the US government to do without.

news.title: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
news.snippet: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.

news.title: US Senate Candidate Caught Insider Trading on Kalshi Says He Did It on Purpose
news.snippet: Mark Moran, an underdog Senate candidate from Virginia, claims he wanted to get caught violating the prediction market platform’s rules.

news.title: Scientists Gave Cocaine to Salmon and You Will Absolutely Believe What Happened Next
news.snippet: After scientists exposed wild fish to cocaine and a cocaine metabolite, they observed that, as in the lab, fish on cocaine do not act like normal fish.

news.title: 5 AI Models Tried to Scam Me. Some of Them Were Scary Good
news.snippet: The cyber capabilities of AI models have experts rattled. AI’s social skills may be just as dangerous.

news.title: AI Tools Are Helping Mediocre North Korean Hackers Steal Millions
news.snippet: One group of hackers used AI for everything from vibe coding their malware to creating fake company websites—and stole as much as $12 million in three months.

news.title: USAID Whistleblower Says It Was Even Worse Than People Knew
news.snippet: Political appointees wanted a quiet drawdown, the whistleblower says. DOGE wanted an execution.

news.title: New Gas-Powered Data Centers Could Emit More Greenhouse Gases Than Entire Nations
news.snippet: A WIRED review of permits for data center projects using natural gas and linked to OpenAI, Meta, Microsoft, and xAI shows they could emit more than 129 million tons of greenhouse gases per year.

news.title: Join Our Livestream: Musk v. Altman and the Future of OpenAI
news.snippet: On May 8, we’re going live to answer your questions about the Musk v. Altman trial that could determine the fate of OpenAI.

news.title: The Pope’s Warnings About AI Were AI-Generated, a Detection Tool Claims
news.snippet: Pangram Labs’ updated Chrome extension puts warning labels on AI slop as you scroll your social feeds.

news.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
news.snippet: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

news.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
news.snippet: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

news.title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
news.snippet: X's AI-powered custom timelines are replacing Communities, with Grok-curated feeds...and new ad slots.

news.title: Tesla Q1 revenue rises, driven by EV sales and FSD subscriptions
news.snippet: Sales rebounded a bit from the first quarter of 2025, as Tesla throws a ton of money at massive bets like robotics, AI, and its own chip fab.

news.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
news.snippet: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

news.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
news.snippet: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

news.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
news.snippet: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

news.title: 一个对话框、一只青蛙、一周4万用户，Ribbi做对了什么？
news.snippet:
访谈｜邓咏仪 周鑫雨
  文｜周鑫雨
  编辑｜杨轩
  乍一使用，你很难给Ribbi一个准确的定义。
  若说这是一个多模态内容创作工具，Ribbi能做得不止于此。比起一个“死”的工具，Ribbi更像一个可以自动管理创作全链路的“人”。
  它能将用户的创作流程，自动沉淀为Skill；也能监测社交媒体的数据表现，总结复盘

news.title: 36氪研究院 | 2026年中国银发经济产业研究报告
news.snippet: 当前，在人口老龄化、长寿化与少子化趋势叠加，政策持续完善、需求加速释放、供给体系不断升级的共同驱动下，中国银发经济正从传统养老保障加快向覆盖“为老”与“备老”的综合性产业体系延伸。国家统计局数据显示，2025年末我国60岁及以上人口已达3.23亿，占总人口比重23.0%；经国家卫健委测算，到2035年前后，我国60岁及以上人口将突破4亿，占总人口比重将超30%，进入重度老龄化阶段。在人口结构

news.title: 具微科技两个月狂揽4轮数亿元融资，产业资本“天团”强势入局 | 36氪首发
news.snippet:
36氪获悉，全域移动智能机器人公司杭州具微科技有限公司（下简称「具微科技」）近期完成A+++轮融资。本轮融资由滨州国投、魏桥集团、滨州股份联合领投，和达控股、德诺资本跟投，其中滨州国投连续追投。资金将重点用于核心技术的持续深度研发，以及全国范围内特种应用场景的规模化落地与商业化推进。

news.title: 押注AAV体内CAR-T，「西湖云谷智药」即将启动IIT研究
news.snippet:
文｜胡香赟

  被收购企业Orna Therapeutics主要从事环状RNA研究，核心药物是一款靶向CD19的体内CAR-T，即将步入临床试验阶段。相较动辄百万元一针的传统CAR-T，体内CAR

news.title: 推理卡毛利率下滑超7%，天数智芯「降价换量」的买卖值不值？
news.snippet: 2个多月前在港股上市的天数智芯，近期发布了2025年财报。公布当天，股价下跌了10个点。在此之前，天数股价已从342港元的高位大幅回调。财报显示，天数全年营收10.34亿元，同比增长91.6%。一级市场投资人林云直言，这个表现没有达到大家的心理预期。对比其他几家国产公司这两年来的增长速度，市场给天数的营收底线预期是：12亿元。但另一方面，分析师Ethan透露，资本

news.title: 明日新程完成连续两轮融资，领跑Harness群体多智能体赛道

news.title: RGB-Mini LED电视普及风暴，海信正式发布小墨E5S Pro
news.snippet: 4月22日，海信举行了主题为“好电视的新答案”2026海信电视小墨E5系列新品发布会，正式推出全新一代产品——RGB-Mini LED电视爆款王小墨E5S Pro，以及Mini LED电视口碑王小墨E5S。作为2025年全网销冠的全新进化之作，小墨E5S Pro以革命性的RGB-Mini LED显示技术普及为核心，带来原生色彩、舒适视觉、绿色节能全方位跨代体验；小墨E5S则将过往Pro级的满

news.title: 标配8255芯片与CDC，奇瑞试图终结“燃油车无智驾”时代
news.snippet: 2026年，当大模型与端到端被默认打上“新能源专属”的标签时，燃油车是否注定被智能时代抛弃？奇瑞试图用一种近乎“重写底层代码”的方式给出否定答案。4月22日，全新一代瑞虎9在北京正式上市 。这不仅是奇瑞新燃油战略的一枚重磅落子，更是这家“理工男”车企试图在智能化深水区，为庞大的燃油车基本盘抢回“数字主权”的一次极限突围 。PART 1<h2

news.title: 找来刘翔做代言人，可能是智己LS8最好的一步棋
news.snippet: 作者：王瑞昊编辑：李雨晨4月16日，智己LS8上市，4款车指导价区间为26.18-31.18万元，而截至5月31日的权益价是24.98-29.98万元。作为一款车长超过5米的大六座增程SUV，且智己的定位又是高端智能电动品牌，LS8的定价在同类品牌中算得上充满竞争力。也正因如此，LS8上市后60分钟大定便超过8000台。智己LS8已在半

news.title: 倍思 MC2 耳夹式耳机开售：60 小时总续航、IP67 级防尘防水，349 元
news.snippet: IT之家 4 月 23 日消息，倍思 MC2 耳夹式耳机今日 10:00 正式开售，售价 349 元。

news.title: 外媒概览 iPhone / iPad 全球供应链，苹果主力组装线迁回美国不现实
news.snippet: IT之家 4 月 23 日消息，科技媒体 Appleinsider 今天（4 月 23 日）发布博文，报道称苹果产品制造依赖全球供应链，零部件供应商遍布北美、欧洲和亚洲，是一个高度全球化的协作过程，因此 iPhone 主力组装线迁回美国并不现实。该博文概览了苹果产品的芯片、屏幕、存储等元件供应，以及组装等全产业链流程，指出尽管面临美国关税政策压

news.title: 腾讯云发布 Xinference 供应链投毒风险通告：可窃取云凭证、API 密钥等
news.snippet: IT之家 4 月 23 日消息，腾讯云今日发布 Xinference 供应链投毒风险通告。腾讯云安全中心监测到，Xinference 被披露其存在供应链投毒风险。可导致攻击者在用户安装或导入受影响版本的包时，窃取云凭证、API 密钥、SSH 密钥、加密钱包、数据库凭据及环境变量等高度敏感信息，并发送至远程命令与控制（C2）服务器。

news.title: 当"真人"成为非遗：影视行业的AI围城
news.snippet: 行业在推，创作者在退——AI电影的这道裂缝，正在越撕越大。

news.title: Edge AI Daily 早报（4月23日）
news.snippet: 谷歌在Cloud Next大会全面转向代理式AI战略，云业务营收突破700亿美元，推出自主AI代理工具挑战OpenAI主导地位。OpenAI发布ChatGPT工作空间助手及Images 2.0模型，与Infosys合作整合Codex拓展企业市场。特斯拉宣布2026年底推出无监督FSD及Robotaxi服务，面临技术突破与监管博弈。
